title: Fix GPT-facing prompts (downloadable .zip; base64 parser-only) + completion/truncation hardening (UC1 core) + falsifiable continuity harness — MOCK-proven, NO real site
editor: pi (GPT-5.5) single editor; editing legs serialized
summary: All five tasks complete on the mock/build half. The two operator root-cause defects are fixed and proven falsifiable on the mock: (1) the bundle patch-return prompt now asks for one actual downloadable .zip file with ZERO base64 wording (base64 retained as a silent parser-only fallback); (2) the continuity test is non-circular (nonce planted turn-1-only, ABSENT from the recall prompt) with a genuinely-failing fresh-conversation control, plus a cross-process registry-continuity variant. T1 hardened the real/cdp completion path so a mid-stream micro-pause no longer returns a clipped turn (text-stable-alone no longer signals done; completion requires positive affordance evidence; progress-aware timeout). NO real-site contact occurred.

honest_scope_and_non_blocking_notes: Mock-only: continuity, truncation, and the download-return prompt are proven on the loopback mock; real behavior is M-008b. Harness helpers are channel-agnostic so M-008b flips channel=cdp without rewriting assertions.

Bundle prompt presumes a file-tool-capable ChatGPT surface; if the real surface cannot create a downloadable file the honest outcome is DownloadUnsupportedError (the base64 parser tolerance is a silent safety net, not an invited fallback). M-008b must run on a file-capable surface and discover/populate the real download_artifact selector.

wait_for_completion default timeout changed 10s -> 120s and is now progress-aware (deadline extends while body text grows). Production callers pass their own timeout_s; the 120s default is a safety floor for direct callers. M-008b may consider a hard ceiling for pathological never-completing streams. Non-defect; flagged for awareness.
Cosmetic: _REAL_COMPLETION_STABLE_S (driver.py:45) is now an orphaned constant (the text-stable logic was removed). Harmless; can be cleaned in a future leg.

recommended_next.mission: M-008b (real legs over CDP) — operator waived manual sign-off; on team-lead spot-check pass, dispatch with no operator halt.
recommended_next.preconditions: Operator's CDP browser up at 127.0.0.1:9222 (Profile 1, signed into chatgpt.com); preflight before any real leg, stop cleanly (CDP_UNREACHABLE) if down. Use a file-output-capable ChatGPT surface.
legs: Discover + populate real.json download_artifact selector (and optional completion_affordance) from the live UI; keep fail-closed until verified.
UC2 real round-trip via the DOWNLOAD path (prompt now asks for a downloadable .zip): verify a real download affordance appears and Playwright captures the file; validate+apply+diff-match.
Real falsifiable continuity: flip tests/test_continuity_mock.py helpers to channel=cdp (plant turn-1 nonce, recall turn-2 with nonce absent, fresh-conversation control must fail, cross-process).

Real response-truncation: send the truncation-elicitation prompt over cdp; assert the long response returns COMPLETE (all ordered lines + terminal sentinel) — exercises the T1 completion hardening on the real site.
Re-issue an honest VERIFICATION.md verdict; human-paced, audited, NO message cap.

complexity_or_paradigm_signals: The download-capture retrieve path (patch.py) and the mock download affordance (server.py) ALREADY EXISTED before this mission. T2's real work was therefore prompt + doc rewrite, not new plumbing — the operator's 'downloads don't work' was a PROMPT-DESIGN problem (circular base64 instruction), confirmed from ground truth. This validates the operator root-cause.

Genuine continuity testing on a mock required modeling memory: an opt-in, conversation-scoped recall mode that derives turn-2 recall from stored history (mock receives only the token PATTERN, never the nonce). Without it, a control cannot genuinely fail and the test is circular.
resume_state: Mission COMPLETE; nothing in-flight. No pi workers running. If reopened, all deliverables exist on disk at the commits above; the gate awaits the team-lead adversarial panel + spot check, then M-008b.
